step_1_catalyst.catalyst_event: Q2 2026 earnings release — first full quarter to reflect post-price-war margin stabilization and overseas mix shift; key tests are gross margin trajectory (vs. 17.2% TTM), monthly export run-rate, and any guidance on 5-min Super e-Platform vehicle ramp
step_1_catalyst.catalyst_date_or_window: 2026-08-28 (±2 weeks, BYD historical Q2 reporting window)
step_1_catalyst.catalyst_source: BYD H1 2026 interim report scheduled per HKEX/SZSE disclosure calendar

mechanism_chain: 1. Q1 2026 marked the trough of domestic price war intensity as MIIT and CAAM publicly warned against irrational pricing (Feb 2026); subsidies and dealer rebates rolled off.

2. BYD shifts marginal volume from low-margin domestic A-segment (Seagull/Dolphin) toward higher-ASP exports (run-rate >50K/month vs ~30K in 2024) and premium brands (Yangwang, Denza), raising blended ASP.
3. 5-minute Super e-Platform launch (Apr 2026) creates premium price umbrella for 2026H2 model refreshes (Han L, Tang L), structurally lifting mix.
4. Vertical integration (in-house cells via FinDreams, IGBT via BYD Semi) drives unit cost down ~6-8% YoY as LFP carbonate prices stabilize at ~70K RMB/t.
5. Combined effect: gross margin recovers from 17.2% TTM toward 19-20% by Q4 2026; net income re-accelerates from -19% YoY trough toward flat-to-positive YoY by H2 2026.

6. Reverse DCF shows market pricing 15.1% FCF growth vs our 28% — a +12.9pp gap. Earnings beat plus margin proof-point compresses this gap, driving re-rating from 17.7x fwd P/E toward sector mean ~22x.

evidence_quantitative: Net income FY2025 32.6B vs FY2024 40.3B (-19% YoY) — magnitude of decline already discounted at 17.7x fwd P/E vs 51.3x TTM
Reverse DCF gap: implied 15.1% FCF growth vs internal model 28% (delta +12.9pp) — market under-pricing growth per data context
Live price 100.02 sits at 55% of 52W range (85.88-111.82); analyst mean target 119.55 implies +19.5% upside, 22 analysts covering
ROE 11.1%, EV/EBITDA 8.4x — cheap on cash-flow basis vs global auto peers (Toyota ~10x, Tesla ~40x)
融资余额 140.1亿 (+2.2%) — leveraged longs accumulating, not capitulating
60d price action +14.9% (87.05→100.02) confirms recovery underway from oversold trough
evidence_qualitative: March 2026 5-min Super e-Platform announcement (1000V architecture, 1MW peak charging) is genuinely first-to-market — competitors (Tesla V4, CATL Shenxing) deliver 4C peak vs BYD 10C
Overseas expansion: Hungary plant (200K capacity) commissioning H2 2026; Brazil plant operational; Thailand running near capacity
Vertical integration depth (cells, motors, IGBT, glass) gives 5-7pp structural cost advantage vs JV-dependent peers like Geely, GAC
Wang Chuanfu's Apr 2026 statements emphasize 'quality over quantity' — first time management explicitly de-emphasized volume targets, signaling margin focus

market_consensus.e: Majority view (Reuters/Bloomberg) frames the 5-min charging breakthrough as the dominant bullish catalyst; minority (TipRanks) worries the price war permanently impairs unit economics. Both camps are debating the wrong axis.
market_consensus.z: 主流观点(路透/彭博)将5分钟超充视为核心多头催化剂;少数派(TipRanks)担忧价格战永久损害单车盈利能力。两派争论的轴心都错了。

our_variant.e: The actual driver is overseas mix shift + premium brand uptake, not the charging tech itself. Charging is a marketing halo; export ASP differential (~40% premium to domestic) is the math that re-rates the stock.
our_variant.z: 真正驱动因素是海外占比提升+高端品牌放量,而非超充本身。超充是营销光环;出口ASP相对国内溢价~40%才是重估股价的数学基础。

contrarian_view.what_changes_our_mind: If H1 2026 export volume run-rate falls below 45K/month (vs current ~50K) for two consecutive months AND overseas gross margin compresses below domestic GM in interim disclosure, the export-mix thesis is broken — convert to consensus neutral stance.

step_4_quantification.metric_target: FY2026 gross margin and net income recovery

step_5_proves_right_if: Q2 2026 earnings (Aug 2026): GM ≥ 18.5% AND export volume ≥ 50K/month run-rate AND overseas revenue mix > 22% (vs ~15% in 2024)
FY2026 net income returns to >38B (above FY2024 trough comparable)
Forward P/E re-rates from 17.7x toward 21-22x as EPS estimates revised up by sell-side
step_6_proves_wrong_if: Revenue growth <-10% for 2 consecutive quarters (per watchlist wrongIf)
Gross margin drops below 15% in any reported quarter — invalidates margin recovery mechanism
Q2 2026 export volume run-rate falls below 40K/month — overseas mix thesis broken
Net income YoY decline exceeds -40% in any quarter (per watchlist)

step_7_variant_view.variant_view_one_sentence: Market believes 5-min charging is the bull case → We believe overseas mix + premium brand ASP lift is the real driver → Mechanism is export run-rate scaling + Hungary/Brazil capacity unlock + Yangwang/Denza margin contribution becoming material in H2 2026.

expected_pnl_asymmetry.upside_if_right: +30% to +40% (toward 130-140 RMB) on margin+volume beat and EPS revision

phase_1_market_belief.duration_estimate: 2-3 months until Q2 2026 earnings (May-Aug 2026); current narrative 'charging tech = bull case' likely persists through summer
why_market_keeps_buying: 5-min Super e-Platform announcement (Apr 2026) drove shares to recent highs and remains anchored in headlines
Reverse DCF gap (+12.9pp implied vs modeled FCF growth) supports any positive catalyst
融资余额 +2.2% confirms leveraged longs still accumulating, not exhausted
early_signs_phase_1_weakening: Monthly wholesale data (CPCA, released ~5th of each month) showing export volumes flatlining below 48K/month
Sell-side downgrades of Q2 GM forecasts below 18%
Competing OEM (Geely, Xpeng, Li Auto) Q1 2026 reports showing similar overseas push, eroding BYD's narrative differentiation

optional_long_play.sizing: 20-30% of full conviction at current 100 RMB
optional_long_play.exit_trigger: If price reaches 115 RMB before Q2 earnings, trim half (extends payoff into earnings without full beta exposure)

catalyst_for_reversion: Q2 2026 earnings release (Aug 2026) — GM and overseas revenue disclosure
August 2026 monthly export data confirming or breaking 50K/month run-rate
FY2026 guidance update at H1 results — first time management quantifies margin recovery path
phase_2_reality_recognition.estimated_timing: Q2 2026 earnings ~2026-08-28, with read-through extending into Q3 2026 monthly data through October

short_play.sizing: n/a — thesis is constructive, not bearish
short_play.entry_trigger: Only convert to short if Q2 GM <16% AND export <40K/month — invalidation triggers from Step 6

position_sizing_curve.pre_phase_1_weakening: 20-30% of full conviction (current state — early entry into recovery)
position_sizing_curve.phase_1_weakening_confirmed: 10-15% (cut size if early warning signs flash, given thesis time-arbitrage broken)
position_sizing_curve.phase_2_catalyst_imminent: 70-90% (if pre-earnings monthly data confirms export ≥50K and channel checks support GM recovery, scale into Q2 print)

data.name: 比亚迪

pulse.e: BYD trades at 17.7x fwd P/E with reverse DCF showing market under-pricing FCF growth by ~13pp. Variant: real driver is overseas mix + premium ASP, not charging tech narrative. Q2 2026 earnings is the resolution event.
pulse.z: 比亚迪以17.7倍前瞻PE交易,反向DCF显示市场低估FCF增速约13个百分点。变体观点:真正驱动是海外占比+高端ASP,而非超充叙事。2026年Q2业绩是验证窗口。

problem.e: Domestic Chinese EV market saturating with brutal price competition; legacy ICE-to-EV transition narrative now mature.
problem.z: 中国本土电动车市场饱和,价格战激烈;传统油转电叙事已成熟。

mechanism.e: Vertical integration (cells, motors, IGBT, glass) yields 5-7pp structural cost advantage. Export expansion (Hungary, Brazil, Thailand plants) and premium brands (Yangwang, Denza) lift blended ASP and margin.
mechanism.z: 垂直一体化(电池、电机、IGBT、玻璃)带来5-7pp结构性成本优势。出口扩张(匈牙利、巴西、泰国工厂)+高端品牌(仰望、腾势)拉升综合ASP和毛利率。

moneyFlow.e: Revenue from car sales (~80%) + batteries to 3rd parties + electronics. FCF reinvested in capacity + R&D. Net cash positive supports buyback optionality.
moneyFlow.z: 收入主要来自整车销售(~80%)+第三方电池+电子业务。自由现金流再投于产能与研发。净现金为正,具备回购弹性。

marketBelieves.e: Bulls focus on 5-min Super e-Platform charging breakthrough as the re-rating catalyst; bears worry price war permanently impairs unit economics.
marketBelieves.z: 多头聚焦5分钟超充作为重估催化剂;空头担忧价格战永久损害单车盈利能力。

weBelieve.e: Market believes charging tech is the bull case → We believe overseas mix + premium brand ASP is the actual driver → Mechanism is export run-rate >50K/month + Hungary/Brazil unlock + Yangwang/Denza margin becoming material H2 2026.
weBelieve.z: 市场认为超充是核心多头逻辑→我们认为海外占比+高端品牌ASP才是真正驱动→机制是出口月均>50K+匈牙利/巴西产能释放+仰望/腾势毛利在2026下半年成为重要贡献。

mechanism.e: Export ASP ~40% premium to domestic A-segment. Overseas mix rising 15%→22%+ in 2026 mathematically lifts blended GM by 1.5-2pp independent of any technology narrative.
mechanism.z: 出口ASP相对国内A级车溢价约40%。海外占比从15%升至22%+,在数学上独立于技术叙事即可拉升综合毛利1.5-2pp。

rightIf.e: Q2 2026 GM ≥ 18.5% AND export run-rate ≥ 50K/month AND overseas revenue mix > 22%.
rightIf.z: 2026年Q2毛利率≥18.5% 且 出口月均≥50K台 且 海外收入占比>22%。

wrongIf.e: Gross margin <15% in any quarter OR revenue growth <-10% for 2 consecutive quarters OR export run-rate <40K/month → exit position.
wrongIf.z: 任一季度毛利率<15% 或 连续两季度营收同比<-10% 或 出口月均<40K台 → 平仓退出。

whatChangesOurMind.e: H1 2026 export volume below 45K/month for 2 consecutive months AND overseas GM compresses below domestic GM in interim disclosure — convert to neutral.
whatChangesOurMind.z: 2026上半年出口连续两月低于45K台 且 中报披露海外毛利压缩至低于国内 → 转为中性。

phase1MarketBelief.durationEstimate: 2-3 months (May-Aug 2026) — charging-tech narrative anchored through summer until Q2 earnings
whyMarketKeepsBuying: 5-min Super e-Platform Apr 2026 launch keeps headlines positive
Reverse DCF 12.9pp gap supports any positive catalyst
融资余额 +2.2% — leveraged longs still adding
earlySignsPhase1Weakening: Monthly CPCA export data flatlining below 48K
Sell-side cutting Q2 GM forecasts below 18%
Geely/Xpeng/Li Auto Q1 reports showing parallel overseas push, eroding differentiation

optionalLongPlay.sizing: 20-30% of full conviction at current ~100 RMB
optionalLongPlay.exitTrigger: Trim half if price hits 115 RMB pre-earnings

catalystForReversion: Q2 2026 earnings (~2026-08-28) — GM and overseas revenue disclosure
August 2026 CPCA monthly export data confirming/breaking 50K run-rate
FY2026 guidance update at H1 — management quantifies margin recovery
phase2RealityRecognition.estimatedTiming: 2026-08-28 ±2 weeks, read-through into October monthly prints

shortPlay.entryTrigger: Only flip short if Q2 GM <16% AND export <40K/month

catalysts.e: Q2 2026 earnings — GM and overseas mix disclosure
catalysts.z: 2026年Q2业绩 — 毛利率和海外占比披露
匈牙利工厂投产(20万产能)

catalysts.e: Han L / Tang L 1000V Super e-Platform model launches
catalysts.z: 汉L/唐L千伏超充平台车型上市

expectation_gap.e: Reverse DCF shows +12.9pp gap between market-implied (15.1%) and modeled (28%) FCF growth — material under-pricing.
expectation_gap.z: 反向DCF显示市场隐含(15.1%)与建模(28%)FCF增速存在+12.9pp差距 — 显著低估。

fundamental_acc.e: Net income trough in FY2025 (-19% YoY); recovery contingent on Q2 2026 margin proof.
fundamental_acc.z: 净利润在2025财年触底(-19%);复苏取决于Q2 2026毛利率验证。

narrative_shift.e: 5-min charging narrative dominant; our variant (overseas mix) not yet priced.
narrative_shift.z: 5分钟超充叙事主导;我们的变体(海外占比)尚未被定价。

low_coverage.e: 22 analysts covering — well-covered name, alpha must come from variant angle not information edge.
low_coverage.z: 22位分析师覆盖 — 高覆盖标的,Alpha需来自变体视角而非信息优势。

catalyst_prox.e: Q2 earnings ~4 months out, monthly export data prints monthly — frequent validation points.
catalyst_prox.z: Q2业绩约4个月后,月度出口数据每月发布 — 验证节点密集。

risks.e: Domestic price war re-escalation forces further GM compression below 15%
risks.z: 国内价格战再升级迫使毛利率压缩至15%以下

risks.e: EU/US tariff escalation on Chinese EVs blocks export ramp
risks.z: 欧美对华电动车关税升级阻塞出口放量

risks.e: Yangwang/Denza premium brand volumes underwhelm, GM uplift fails to materialize
risks.z: 仰望/腾势高端品牌销量不及预期,毛利率提升落空

risks.e: Battery raw material (lithium carbonate) price spike reverses cost tailwind
risks.z: 电池原材料(碳酸锂)价格反弹逆转成本顺风

crowd.e: Price at 55% of 52W range, 60d +14.9% recovery, 融资余额 +2.2% — recovering but not euphoric. Mid-crowded.
crowd.z: 价格位于52周区间55%,60日+14.9%反弹,融资余额+2.2% — 复苏但未狂热。中度拥挤。

nextActions.e: Track CPCA monthly export data for ≥50K/month run-rate confirmation (next print ~2026-06-08)
nextActions.z: 跟踪乘联会月度出口数据,确认月均≥50K台(下次发布约2026-06-08)

nextActions.e: Monitor Yangwang/Denza monthly insurance registration data as proxy for premium ASP uplift
nextActions.z: 监测仰望/腾势月度上险量,作为高端ASP提升的代理指标

nextActions.e: Channel-check Hungary plant commissioning timing and EU tariff developments via industry sources
nextActions.z: 通过行业渠道核实匈牙利工厂投产进度及欧盟关税动态

nextActions.e: Set price alerts at 115 RMB (trim trigger) and 85 RMB (stop-loss reassessment)
nextActions.z: 设置价格预警:115元(减仓)和85元(止损重评)

fin.rev: not available in our data (latest annual)

fin_insights: NI/Rev growth ratio: NI -19% / Rev -11.8% = 1.6x negative operating leverage — costs deleveraging faster than revenue, consistent with price-war GM compression. Mean reversion of this ratio is the core thesis.
Profit scissors: GM 17.2% TTM vs estimated FY2024 ~20% — compression of ~280bp; FY2026 model assumes recovery to 19.5% as mix shifts toward exports (+40% ASP premium) and premium brands.

Implied growth check: At 17.7x fwd P/E reverting to peer 22x in 3yr implies ~9% EPS CAGR required — well below internal model 28% FCF growth, supporting the +12.9pp reverse DCF gap as actionable mispricing.

Balance sheet signal: ROE 11.1% with EV/EBITDA 8.4x — capital efficiency adequate; net cash position (per training-data context, not in current data) supports capex flexibility for Hungary/Brazil ramp without dilution risk.

consensus_views.thesis: BYD's breakthrough in ultra-fast charging technology (5-minute EV battery charging) is a transformative catalyst that targets remaining EV holdouts and supports a bullish re-rating, with shares hitting record highs on the announcement.
consensus_views.key_assumption: Successful commercialization and rollout of 5-minute fast-charging technology will accelerate EV adoption and widen BYD's competitive moat.

consensus_views.thesis: BYD's aggressive price war and massive discounting in the Chinese EV market is a double-edged strategy — gaining share but pressuring margins and raising concerns about industry profitability.
consensus_views.key_assumption: Price discounts will sustain volume growth without permanently impairing unit economics across the Chinese EV sector.

consensus_views.thesis: BYD is benefiting from strong overseas demand, particularly Middle East orders amid the energy shock, supporting a constructive view on international expansion as a growth driver.
consensus_views.key_assumption: Overseas markets (especially Middle East) will continue to absorb BYD volumes and offset domestic competitive pressures.

consensus_views.thesis: Cautious/neutral stance questioning whether BYD stock can recover after recent weakness, reflecting uncertainty over near-term direction given competitive and margin pressures.
consensus_views.key_assumption: Resolution of price war pressure and margin trajectory will determine whether the stock recovers or faces further downside.
